description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the weltn24/up-docker-node-chrome-headless Docker image and caching the node_modules/ directory. Define a hidden .pre stage with an installs job that runs npm install on all branches except master. Add a test stage with a test job that runs npm test on all branches except master. Add a deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch, executes mkdir .public, copies the doc/ contents into .public, moves .public to public, and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact. Ensure the pages job’s artifact path is public.
